case_title: DANIEL BAKER VS. WILLIAM J. RUTTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-06-2019 CONTINUED TO MAR-20-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-22-2019.
FEE PAID ON STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER TO CONTINUE THE JURISDICTIONAL PERIOD OF THE ARBITRATOR (TRANSACTION ID # 64371754) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, DANIEL
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100068946) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUTTER, WILLIAM J.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100076458) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUTTER, WILLIAM J. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 63502480) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, DANIEL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-12-2019. THE JUL-17-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT RUTTER, WILLIAM J. DOES 1-25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-06-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-14-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 63085605), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, DANIEL SERVED MAR-13-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUTTER, WILLIAM J.
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100068946) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT RUTTER, WILLIAM J.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100073198) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUTTER, WILLIAM J. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR CAROL LEE HEALEY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-23-2019 THROUGH NOV-21-2019.
ORDER TO CONTINUE THE JURISDICTIONAL PERIOD OF THE ARBITRATOR; STIPULATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100097584)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 63022608) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, DANIEL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RICHARD MARTIN ROGERS.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-20-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-17-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE JUN-18-2019 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR KAREN ELAINE KIRBY.
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO FEB-19-2020. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
